title: Maa Inti Devatha
subTitle: Bhoomi, a young woman, is an only child who longs for the warmth and love of a joint family. Her wish is fulfilled when she gets married, but she strives to win over her husband's large family.

title: Bhairavi
subTitle: Bhairavi has a loving mother but an evil father. However, despite her affectionate nature, she faces betrayal from the family.

title: Constable Manju
subTitle: Once martyred in the line of duty, a constable's position is inherited by his incorruptible daughter. However, soon, she encounters the benevolent enforcer of a notorious criminal.

title: Ammaku Prematho
subTitle: Two siblings, who have been separated as children, cross paths in search of the same individual after she is released from prison following a murder conviction.

title: Bhamalu Satya Bhamalu
subTitle: The host invites contestants to the stage to share their stories and compete in various entertaining games to win prizes.

title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
subTitle: Kaveri's life drastically changes when she meets Arjun. However, she faces new challenges, when Arjun's mother approaches her regarding the rift she has with her son.

title: Abhinandana
subTitle: Rahul and Abhisarika are childhood lovers who have grown apart. However, later, Abhisarika changes her look and marries Rahul, concealing her true identity from him.

title: Sivangi
subTitle: A village belle with a strong character takes care of her family members. Furthermore, she embarks on a journey alone to overcome financial issues and provide a good lifestyle for her dear ones.

title: Constable Manju
subTitle: Once martyred in the line of duty, a constable's position is inherited by his incorruptible daughter. However, soon, she encounters the benevolent enforcer of a notorious criminal.

subTitle: The host invites contestants to the stage to share their stories and compete in various entertaining games to win prizes.

title: Srihari Kalyanam
subTitle: Lakshmi, devoted to her family, weds Srihari, vowing to keep supporting her loved ones. Their marriage soon faces unexpected trials, testing their bond and joy.

title: Cameraman Ganga tho Rambabu
subTitle: A determined camerawoman helps a passionate mechanic's transformation into a journalist. When a corrupt politician murders their colleague, the duo embarks on a mission to dismantle his political empire through investigative reporting.

title: Murari
subTitle: A family line is haunted by a terrible curse that takes the life of one family member every forty-eight years. Eventually, an ageing woman vows to break the curse by making an invaluable sacrifice.

title: Dhruva
subTitle: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

title: Legend
subTitle: Krishna, an NRI living in Dubai, falls in love with Sneha. He comes to India to seek the blessings of his grandmother, unaware that don Jeetendra's gang is seeking revenge.

title: Nuvvostanante Nenoddantana
subTitle: Santosh, a rich boy raised in London, loves Siri, a poor girl living in rural India. Both families oppose their union due to their financial backgrounds, but Santosh vows to prove everyone wrong.

title: Leo
subTitle: Parthiban, a cafe owner, lives with his wife and son in Himachal Pradesh. Things take an absurd turn for him when he gets in the way of a drug cartel.

subTitle: Madhu motivates Ramu to go to college and become an educated person and they eventually fall in love. However, her mother, Tribhuvna, is against their union and tries to kill Ramu.

subTitle: Camaraderie sours as Lalitha and Annapurna vie for Shivaramaraju's affection, both marrying him. Subsequently, a birthing mishap compels him to clandestinely part Annapurna's twins.

title: Shivamani
subTitle: Sivamani, a police officer, is determined to catch Dattu, a thug. Things take a turn when Dattu abducts Sivamani's girlfriend and Sivamani joins forces with a newspaper editor to rescue her.
